summary: Completed testing for Iteration 38 - Abandoned Cart Recovery Feature. Backend tests: 19/19 passed. Frontend UI verified working with all tabs (Overview, Abandoned Carts, Recovery Logs, Settings), store selector, and quick actions.
critical_code_review_comments: cart_recovery_service.py: Well-structured service with proper MongoDB integration, WhatsApp API integration, and comprehensive message templates for 3 reminder stages
CartRecoveryDashboard.jsx: Clean React component with proper state management, API integration, and responsive UI with tabs for Overview, Abandoned Carts, Recovery Logs, and Settings
WhatsApp integration uses Meta Cloud API - requires WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID and WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN env vars (configured in backend/.env)
Multi-store support implemented correctly with currency formatting (INR for tnvcollection, PKR for tnvcollectionpk)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing empty state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 tested Abandoned Cart Recovery feature. All 8 API endpoints working: GET/PUT settings, GET stats, GET abandoned-carts, POST send-reminder, POST send-bulk-reminders, GET logs, POST mark-converted. Frontend dashboard at /cart-recovery with 4 tabs. WhatsApp API configured but will fail without valid Meta credentials (expected behavior). No abandoned carts in database currently so empty states displayed.

cart_recovery_settings_api.GET /api/cart-recovery/settings/tnvcolle: PASS - Returns settings for PK store

abandoned_carts_api.GET /api/cart-recovery/abandoned-carts: PASS - Returns empty list (no abandoned carts)

frontend_ui.Overview Tab: PASS - Shows stats cards (Abandoned Carts, Reminders Sent, Recovered, Revenue Recovered)
frontend_ui.Settings Tab: PASS - Shows Recovery Settings with all configuration options
frontend_ui.Store Selector: PASS - Switches between tnvcollection (INR) and tnvcollectionpk (PKR)
frontend_ui.Currency Formatting: PASS - Shows ₹ for INR, Rs. for PKR

mocked_apis.note: WhatsApp API will fail without valid Meta credentials but endpoints work correctly
